caption: A screen recording captures a presentation on a "Rural Community Food System." The primary focus is a complex causal loop diagram with various nodes and connecting arrows, featuring text such as "Changing Mental Models," "Community Knowledge," and "Community Health." In the upper right corner, a small webcam window shows a man wearing a dark shirt and a dark baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, the presenter interacts with the digital map, clicking on a node labeled "Community Health." This action triggers a pop-up window titled "Introduction" that overlays the right side of the diagram. The pop-up contains a question: "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and a section for "Session Videos" with a list of date-based links. The window also includes a call to action inviting viewers to contribute by "adding comments or by leaving a note."
